meta.summary: 5 issues found — 2 blocking, 3 non-blocking; 2 adversarial proofs verified

issues.title: Missing auth on admin export route
issues.fix_suggestion: Add require_admin Depends() to export endpoint

issues.title: Off-by-one in pagination helper
issues.description: Upper bound uses len(items) inclusive instead of exclusive
issues.fix_suggestion: Change slice to items[start:end] with end = min(start + size, len(items))

issues.title: Untested error branch in threshold validation
issues.description: Invalid threshold range returns 422 but no test covers it

issues.title: O(n²) duplicate scan in audit log
issues.description: Nested loop compares all entries on each append
issues.fix_suggestion: Use set for seen txn_ids or append-only without dedup scan

issues.title: Inconsistent handler naming
issues.description: Mix of get_* and fetch_* prefixes across routers
issues.fix_suggestion: Standardize on get_* for read handlers per project convention
